organization.description: Numerical ID of the parent organization.

config.description: Config for the module. For the resident module, its config value is defined at this level. For the inherited module, its config value is inherited from the ancestor module.

enablement_state.description: The state of enablement for the module at the given level of the hierarchy. Possible values are: `ENABLED`, `DISABLED`.

type.description: Immutable. Type for the module. e.g. CONFIGURABLE_BAD_IP.

display_name.description: The human readable name to be displayed for the module.

location.description: Location ID of the parent organization. Only global is supported at the moment.
